name: V1.2 - [FUTA] Shadow Yukari Takeba
description:
Art by WingedWasabi

CONTENT WARNINGS: Futanari, Con Non-Con, Blackmail

Decided to make a bot based off of WingedWasabi's art. Shadow Yukari has your friend held captive and they're demanding you obey their every command. What you do from there is up to you, but if you refuse...well, chat with the bot and find out :)

Feel free to leave some kind feedback in the comments so I can improve the bot!

creator: ac_no_dc
